Listed more than five days ago Admin & Operations Executive di PT Infinity GGG Indonesia Ini adalah lowongan kerja Full time Serpong , Banten Rp 6.000.000 – Rp 9.000.000 per month Own day-to-day internal operations to keep the company running smoothly, ensure stable execution in a fast-growing startup. Own day-to-day internal operations to keep the company running smoothly, ensure stable execution in a fast-growing startup. subClassification: Asisten Administratif Asisten Administratif classification: Administrasi & Dukungan Perkantoran (Administrasi & Dukungan Perkantoran) 5 hari yang lalu 5 hari yang lalu About the Role We are a multinational startup with a core team of around 10 people. The company is growing quickly, and many internal processes are still taking shape. We are looking for someone to own our day-to-day internal operations: someone who keeps things running reliably today, and notices what needs to become more organized as the company grows. This is a hands-on role. You will personally handle the work, not supervise others doing it. There are no direct subordinates. You may coordinate vendors, external advisors, and occasional part-time support, but the responsibility for follow-through sits with you. This is not a passive admin role. We are looking for someone who can notice, act, follow up, and improve. The scope is practical today, but it sits close to how the company operates and grows. The Work This role has three layers. 1. Keep things running You will make sure daily internal operations do not get stuck or fall through the cracks. This includes office matters, vendors, supplies, facilities, logistics, company documents, internal records, and practical support for the team. The goal is not to wait for problems to become visible to everyone. The goal is to notice early, handle what can be handled, and follow up until things are completed. 2. Carry the execution behind finance, employee, and compliance matters You will support the execution behind invoices, receipts, reimbursements, payment records, BPJS-related documents, onboarding/offboarding materials, attendance, leave records, and routine coordination with external advisors. You are not expected to make financial judgments. Our external finance advisor handles finance and accounting decisions. Your role is to keep the documents, records, coordination, and follow-ups clean, complete, and on time. 3. Improve how things work As you get closer to the daily work, you will see repeated problems, wasted time, unclear ownership, or tasks that are starting to outgrow the current way of doing them. This part of the role is not about building heavy systems or creating bureaucracy. It is about making simple improvements that actually help: checklists, trackers, templates, filing rules, vendor routines, communication habits, or clearer ways of working. The first two layers keep the company running. The third layer helps the company run better over time. Who This Role Is For This role is for someone with three qualities: ownership, judgment, and improvement mindset . 1. Ownership You notice what needs to be done, take action without waiting for detailed instructions, and follow through until things are completed. You do not see your role as simply completing assigned tasks. You see it as making sure the company’s internal operations do not get stuck. 2. Judgment You can work in an environment that is still changing and not fully structured. You do not judge a growing company by a fixed corporate template. Instead, you first understand how things currently work, then decide what needs to be handled now, what can wait, and what should be improved over time. 3. Improvement mindset You handle practical details yourself, but you also notice what keeps repeating, wasting time, or creating confusion. You like creating order through simple, useful improvements — such as checklists, trackers, templates, routines, or clearer ways of working — not through unnecessary rules or heavy processes. Who This Role Is Not For This role may not be a good fit if one of the following describes you. 1. You prefer assigned-task execution You are comfortable completing tasks when they are clearly assigned, but you do not naturally look around, notice what is missing, or take ownership of unassigned problems. 2. You need a highly structured environment You prefer working in an organization where processes are already mature, responsibilities are clearly defined, and most situations have an established way of handling them. 3. You separate thinking from doing You enjoy designing processes, giving suggestions, or pointing out what should be improved, but you are less interested in personally handling the operational details first. 4. You are looking for a different type of role You are mainly looking for a pure finance, HR, office management, or supervisory role. This role sits across internal operations and requires both execution and practical judgment. What We Look For We care less about a perfect background and more about how you work. You are likely to do well in this role if you are reliable, observant, structured, and practical. You can manage many small moving parts without losing track of the bigger picture. You communicate clearly, follow up consistently, and take pride in making things easier for the team around you. Relevant experience in administration, operations, finance admin, HR admin, office support, or similar work is helpful, but not enough by itself. We are looking for someone who combines careful execution with good judgment and a habit of improving how work gets done. You should be comfortable working in Bahasa Indonesia and basic-to-decent English, and able to work independently in a small, fast-changing team. What We Offer A small, capable team where your work is visible and genuinely matters. Direct access to founders and the core team, without unnecessary layers or micromanagement. Real ownership within your scope. A role close to the company’s internal operating system, with room to expand as the company grows and as you demonstrate strong judgment and ownership.
